body.title: Fix pre-existing test failure: test_cmd_next_marks_ticket_in_progress
body.result: test_cmd_next_marks_ticket_in_progress already passes — 3/3 tests pass; no fix needed; pre-existing failure resolved by prior work
body.intention: I intend that the test suite has zero pre-existing failures so new regressions are immediately visible.
body.description:
tests/igor/test_cc_queue_dispatch_is_assignment.py::TestCmdNextMarksInProgress::test_cmd_next_marks_ticket_in_progress fails before any of our changes (confirmed by stash-and-run check on 2026-06-06). Not blocking other tests. Needs investigation and fix.

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_cc_queue_dispatch_is_assignment.py (and possibly lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Fix this one test. Do not refactor the queue module beyond what the fix requires.
**Completion criteria:** pytest tests/igor/test_cc_queue_dispatch_is_assignment.py passes with 0 failures.
